ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR XFER FROM DEPT 206 XFER FROM DEPT 206 XFER FROM DEPT 206. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-28-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 624

JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER JUDITH OSSA. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-28-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624, PARTIES HAVE REACHED SETTLEMENT, SENT TO PLACE TERMS ON THE RECORD.
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-28-2002 - MATTER SETTLED. STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT FILED THIS DATE.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIED, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 32 LUNDY LANE, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,112.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,112.50, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-28-2002 - ON SETTLEMENT CALENDAR IN ERROR. SEE TRIAL MINUTES THIS DATE.
